rights_holder: U.S. Navy (work of a federal employee). Photographer: Lt Victor Jorgensen.
attribution: Lt Victor Jorgensen, U.S. Navy. "Cmdr Edward Steichen photographed above the deck of the aircraft carrier USS Lexington." November 1943. National Archives (archives.gov). Public Domain Mark 1.0.
subject: Edward Steichen during his service as commanding officer of the U.S. Naval Aviation Photographic Unit, photographed on the aircraft carrier USS Lexington in November 1943, twelve years before he opened The Family of Man at MoMA.
